2606.26041.title: How Robust is OCR-Reasoning? Evaluating OCR-Reasoning Robustness of Vision-Language Models under Visual Perturbations
2606.26041.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance on OCR-based benchmarks and increasingly focused on text-rich understanding, but their robustness under controlled visual degradation remains insufficiently understood. This gap is critical for OCR reasoning, where visual corruption can induce OCR errors and structural distortions, thereby introducing uncertainty into the reasoning task. To systematically study this problem, we introduce OCR-Robust, a benchmark designed for evaluating OCR reasoning robustness under visual perturbations. It contains 812 samples across two complementary subsets: OCR1.0, covering documents, scene text, receipts, handwriting, and mathematical content, and OCR2.0, focusing on charts, geometry diagrams, and tables. To enable efficient yet informative evaluation, we conduct a pilot study over 18 candidate perturbations and select 5 representative types at 3 severity levels each based on their impact and cross-model discriminability. We evaluate robustness using clean accuracy, Relative Corruption Retention (RCR), Worst-Case Retention (WCR), and a composite Corruption Robustness Index (CRI), and benchmark 18 models spanning proprietary systems, open-source VLMs, and OCR+LLM pipelines. Our results show that higher clean accuracy does not necessarily imply stronger robustness, and that models can suffer pronounced degradation in the worst case on OCR tasks that are sensitive to structure, and charts and tables are substantially more fragile than document-like inputs under perturbation.
2606.26041.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在基於OCR的基準測試中表現出色，並日益專注於文本豐富的理解，但它們在受控視覺退化下的穩健性仍然不足以理解。這一差距對於OCR推理至關重要，因為視覺損壞可能會引發OCR錯誤和結構扭曲，從而在推理任務中引入不確定性。為了系統地研究這個問題，我們引入了OCR-Robust，一個旨在評估OCR推理在視覺擾動下的穩健性的基準。它包含812個樣本，分為兩個互補的子集：OCR1.0，涵蓋文件、場景文本、收據、手寫文字和數學內容，以及OCR2.0，專注於圖表、幾何圖和表格。為了實現高效而有信息量的評估，我們對18種候選擾動進行了初步研究，並根據其影響和跨模型可辨識性選擇了5種具有代表性的類型，每種類型有3個嚴重程度級別。我們使用乾淨準確度、相對損壞保留（RCR）、最壞情況保留（WCR）和綜合損壞穩健性指數（CRI）來評估穩健性，並基準測試了涵蓋專有系統、開源VLM和OCR+LLM管道的18個模型。我們的結果顯示，較高的乾淨準確度不一定意味著更強的穩健性，並且模型在對結構敏感的OCR任務中可能會在最壞情況下遭受明顯的退化，而圖表和表格在擾動下比類文件的輸入脆弱得多。
2606.26041.author: Yuxing Cheng et.al.
2606.26041.authors: Yuxing Cheng, Yuan Wu, Yi Chang
